title: IT Analyst (Credit Cards / Loyalty), Banking (1-year renewable contract)
description:
DearApplicant,

If you orsomeone you know is interested, please send the CV toVeronicaE@evolutionjobs.sg (preferred, as I may overlook some CVs due to thehigh volume).

Please notethat visa sponsorship is not available at this time.

JD

Technical Skills & Experience

Minimum 5 years’ experience in the IT industry, preferably in large, complex enterprises
·       
Broad-based IT knowledge and experience (Hardware, Software, Middleware, Databases). Solid foundation in service-oriented technologies to be able to understand service interdependencies and drive towards technical solutions for multi-tiered systems

Good understanding of Technology Taxonomy (Functional Disposition, Deployment, Performance, Integration Protocols)

Good verbal, written and presentation skills to stakeholders at all levels

Ability to communicate complex topics in an understandable way using a level of detail and terms appropriate to the situationCards& Rewards/Loyalty
- Issuing covering card issuance &lifecycle management, authorization & transaction processing, clearing& settlement, security & compliance, disputes & chargebacks,digital enablement, etc
- Acquiring covering merchant onboarding & management, payment acceptancechannels, transaction processing, settlement & reconciliation, risk &fraud management, etc
- Rewards & Loyalty covering program design & management, earn &redeem mechanics, settlement & accounting, analytics & personalization,customer experience, etc

Collections

- Collections Lifecycle, Strategy & Segmentation,Payment Arrangements, Analytics & Reporting, etc

postedCompany.description:
Evolution Recruitment Solutions are an award winning, specialist IT and Digital recruitment consultancy with offices in Singapore, Sydney, UK, Germany and US. Formed in 2000 we have helped thousands of IT and Digital professionals secure their next Permanent, Contract or Interim position with companies ranging from SME to multinationals. Our professional and quality driven approach has led to Evolution being regularly recommended to others.  

Evolution have received a number of awards in recognition of the outstanding training, development and support we provide to our consultants which in turn results in a higher level of service for both applicants and clients:   


Investors In People - Gold  

2nd place The Sunday Times - 100 Best Small Companies to work for 

Best Companies - 3 Stars for Extraordinary Workforce Engagement  

Jobsite 'Best Industry Knowledge'​ Award  

Global Recruiter Asia Pacific Awards:  

- Best in-house training - Best Newcomer 

- APSCo Asia Member of the Year 

- Best Specialist Recruitment Business  

- Best Small Recruitment Business
